message:
Add capability-pruned hostcall dispatch module (RGC-604A dependency-safe prework)

New module: capability_pruned_dispatch.rs (~1100 lines, 63 unit tests)

Types: PruningPolicy, DispatchSite, CapabilityProof, FlowProofRef,
DispatchRoute, DispatchRejection, DispatchDecisionRecord,
CheckElidableRegion, SpecializationEnvelope, EnvelopeSummary,
DispatchSpecimenFamily

Core: DispatchCompiler compiles capability witnesses and IFC flow proofs
into specialization envelopes. Fast-path dispatch authorized when proofs
meet confidence thresholds; checked-path for degraded mode; explicit
rejection with auditable reasons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
